blockers.description: A hook/linter reverted STATE.md frontmatter fields (milestone, milestone_name, progress.total_phases) back to v1.0/0 after my Edit. Body changes survived but YAML header is stale. Something auto-writes those three fields from an unknown source.
blockers.workaround: Investigate which hook in ~/.claude/hooks/* or GSD skill owns those fields. STATE.md body + PROJECT.md Active section + ROADMAP.md / milestones/v1.5-ROADMAP.md already reflect v1.5 truthfully.

human_actions_pending.context: User flagged that gsd-watch isn't picking up v1.5 phases. The frontmatter `milestone`, `milestone_name`, and `progress` fields reverted to v1.0/0 after my Edit in the same turn. Needs to be fixed before gsd-watch will display Phases 27-30.

decisions.decision: Rebuild DnD on @dnd-kit/core@^6.3.1 with single PointerSensor
decisions.rationale: 3 blockers against Pragmatic DnD: issue #203 transform:scale, issue #165 ESC-cancel platform-gating, iOS Safari 15 native touch flakiness. @dnd-kit/react rejected (pre-1.0, 12 months no releases).
500ms collides with iOS 17.2+ image-action menu; 250ms is @dnd-kit default + Linear/Material convention.
dnd-kit PointerSensor default — balanced between responsive and click-safe.

decisions.decision: Ghost from canvas.toDataURL() as , grab-point preserved, source-size (no cap), artwork-only (no chrome), rendered via DragOverlay in document.body
decisions.rationale: cloneNode produces empty canvas on <canvas> leaves; grab-point preserves feel; cap unnecessary on <280px cells; artwork-only matches the export; portal avoids double-scale under canvas transform:scale().

decisions.decision: Source cell opacity 40% during drag; target cell gets 2px accent outline; active zone 100% white + scale 1.1 + soft glow; inactive 30% white; no insertion line; ghost stays under pointer (no magnetism); no word labels
decisions.rationale: Atlassian Design System + user brief. Insertion line redundant with icons (Trello model). Magnetism and labels deferred to P2.

decisions.decision: ESC snap-back 200ms cubic-bezier(0.15, 1.0, 0.3, 1.0); release outside GridCanvas = cancel; release on origin = snap-back no-op; zones tile cell fully (no dead zones)
decisions.rationale: Atlassian snap-back idiom; consistent cancel affordance across all three exit paths; threshold formula in computeDropZone guarantees full tiling.

decisions.decision: Haptic navigator.vibrate(10) on activation + vibrate(15) on commit; bottom-sheet auto-collapse on drag-start; touch-action:none + -webkit-touch-callout:none + user-select:none + preventDefault on contextmenu
decisions.rationale: Apple HIG physical-confirmation pattern; iOS Photos sheet-collapse pattern; belt-and-braces suppression of iOS image-action menu + scroll hijack + loupe + right-click.

decisions.decision: Whole cell body is drag-activation region (no dedicated handle)
decisions.rationale: More discoverable on collage canvas than Notion-style handles; matches Figma/Canva. Grab cursor on every cell unconditionally.

decisions.decision: 4-phase minimum roadmap: Phase 27 Foundation / 28 Cell-to-Cell (wholesale swap) / 29 ESC+Visual Polish / 30 Mobile Handle+Tray. 42 REQs mapped 8/19/8/7.
decisions.rationale: Architecture module layout + user's 'visual UI/UX first, interactions iteratively' preference; Phase 28 explicitly removes old @dnd-kit wiring in same phase as new engine (no parallel engines).

next_action: Run `/gsd-plan-phase 27` to plan Phase 27 DnD Foundation. That phase scaffolds `src/dnd/` (pure computeDropZone, dragStore, DragPreviewPortal), installs @dnd-kit/modifiers, and writes unit tests — with zero UI wiring and zero regressions. Before running it: investigate the STATE.md frontmatter auto-revert so gsd-watch picks up v1.5.
context_notes: v1.5 planning phase is COMPLETE. All 9 original tasks done across 5 commits: ab3a529 (PROJECT+STATE kickoff) → 63a652f (4 research docs) → 49e7fb7 (SUMMARY synthesis) → 045d3f4 (REQUIREMENTS) → 9bfb388 (ROADMAP) → fefb0af (gsd-watch visibility sync). Ready for execution phase. User preference noted: no worktrees for phase work (standing feedback rule). User wants visual UI/UX first, then interactions iteratively; may add phases past 30 as needs emerge. Key architectural invariants encoded in REQUIREMENTS.md 'Blocking Anti-Patterns' section — resuming agent MUST honor them (single PointerSensor, no spread-then-handler, separate dragStore, no parallel engines, no cloneNode on canvas). Sonnet rate-limit from original pause was no longer active when gsd-roadmapper ran successfully.
